name: Spiced Christmas Ornaments
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients together.
2. Add the applesauce and mix well.
3. Roll out on waxed paper to a 1/2 inch thickness.
4. Sprinkle with cinnamon to keep from sticking.
5. Cut into Christmas shapes.
6. Let decorations air dry for 4 or 5 days, turning once a day.
7. Ornaments can be painted or decorated when dry.
8. Store in a plastic bag each year.
9. When the scent evaporates, add a drop or two of cinnamon oil to the back.
10. These ornaments are wonderful tree decorations or gifts.
